target: echo_default_audio_output (AirPlay) + HomePod via Shortcuts 'Speak Text' + 'Play On HomePod'
principal: Grizz (Robert Barclay Hanson — EMT-P Ret., Founder GrizzlyMedicine Research Institute)
policy_cited: PRINCIPLES.md §4 (alignment tax for HomeKit actuation), §7 (operator partnership authority); VERIFICATION_PROTOCOL.md §3.4 (phase-complete definition, now satisfied post A&Ox4 closure at 2026-04-19T22:42:30Z)
reason: Operator issued explicit broadcast authorization in conversation ('excecute all four please.. immediately', 2026-04-19 CDT). Broadcast is introductory — no command-line content, no secrets exfil, no irreversible mutation. Validation gates all green at broadcast time (Disk, Build, Test, Sig, Voice Approval, A&Ox4 level=4 fresh, NLB software, Cluster 5/5). Advisories (§16.1 sig divergence, §16.2 NLB hardware, §16.3 Storage submodule, §16.4 foxtrot symlink) are all documented and none block runtime actuation.
predicted_effect: Short audible introduction (~15–20 seconds) will play through the Mac's default audio output (currently AirPlay, 44.1 kHz) and — via user-built Shortcuts 'Speak Text' / 'Play On HomePod' — through whichever HomePod(s) / HomeKit speaker group those shortcuts are configured to target. No physical actuators (locks, lights, thermostats) are touched. No network egress beyond the local HomeKit/AirPlay routing. No state changes outside telemetry + this artifact.
reversibility: reversible — audible event is ephemeral; artifacts written are append-only and safely removable; no remote side-effects

signatures.unsigned_reason: Secure Enclave / Ed25519 cold-root signing path lives in JarvisCore runtime + iPhone a-Shell sandbox; this artifact is issued out-of-band by the assistant acting on the operator's direct in-conversation authorization rather than by a JarvisCore ratified action. Dual-signing remains the required path for autonomous-agent actions — this entry documents a human-override broadcast, not an autonomous decision.

policy_cited: PRINCIPLES.md §5 (clinical standard: every architectural bug is a wound, stabilized + documented, not minimized), §8 (deception economics)
reason: The prior broadcast entry at 01:41:00Z failed to specify VOICE PROVENANCE. The broadcast used /usr/bin/say -v Daniel (stock macOS TTS) as a stand-in for JARVIS's voice. Grizz reported real startlement — the JARVIS voice channel runs through VibeVoice hosted on GCP, and substituting a stock voice is an identity violation on the channel plus a startlement-hazard event. Logging this amendment before proposing any further broadcast.
predicted_effect: No further broadcasts fire until the VibeVoice-on-GCP endpoint is (a) reachable, (b) authenticated, and (c) explicitly re-authorized by Grizz. This amendment itself is a disk-only append.
reversibility: reversible — audible event already dissipated; remediation is procedural

signatures.unsigned_reason: out-of-band operator-channel entry, same provenance as the original
